content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Meridian Health Systems
Customer ID: C001
Contract ID: K013
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Deal Type: Renewal + Expansion
Date: March 1, 2024

DEAL SUMMARY
Renewed Meridian Health Systems on InsightIQ Enterprise with an expansion from 30 to 35 users. Applied 5% discount to recognize the multi-year relationship. New ARR: $47,880.

RENEWAL NOTES
Renewal was straightforward. Dr. Forsythe remains the champion and expressed strong satisfaction with the platform. The expanded user count reflects the addition of their third regional facility coming online in Q1 2024, as anticipated at deal close.

NEGOTIATION NOTES
Meridian's procurement team pushed for a 10% discount citing competitive quotes from two vendors. Sarah Chen held firm at 5%, citing the account's growth trajectory and upcoming enterprise features on the roadmap. Procurement accepted after a one-week back and forth.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Dr. Forsythe mentioned interest in InsightIQ's upcoming API integration module for connecting their EHR system. Flag for upsell conversation once the feature is GA, expected Q3 2024.
